block.header: nagwonoumi ni pune simasi kase oki ni idete nami tatiku ya to mite kapyerikomu
nami tateba nagwo no uramwi ni yoru kapi no manaki kwopwi ni so tosi pa penikyeru

sentence.transcription: ma na ki kwopwi ni so

block.header: nagwonoumi ni sipo no paya pwiba asari si ni idemu to tadu pa ima so naku naru
pototogisu itopu toki nasi ayamyegusa kadura ni semu pi ko yu naki watare
ikani aru pusenoura so mo kokodaku ni kimi ga misemu to ware wo todomuru
wopu no saki kogitamotopori pinemosuni mi tomo aku beki ura ni aranaku ni
wopu no saki kimi ga topasu mo pinemosuni mi tomo aku beki ura ni aranaku ni
tamakusige itu si ka akemu pusenoumi no ura wo yukitutu tama mo piripamu
oto nomwi ni kikite me ni minu pusenoura wo mizupa noborazi tosi pa penu tomo
pusenoura wo yukite si miteba momosikwino opomiyapito ni kataritugitemu
ume no pana sakitiru sono ni ware yukamu kimi ga tukapi wo katamatigatera
pudinami no sakiyuku mireba pototogisu naku beki toki ni tikadukinikyeri
asu no pi no puse no uramwi no pudinami ni kedasi kinakazu tirasitemu kamo
pototogisu puse no uramwi no pudinami ni kedasi kinakazu tirasitemu kamo
pamabye yori wa ga utiyukaba umibye ywori mukape mo konu ka ama no turibune
okipye ywori mitikuru sipo no iya masi ni a ga mopu kimi ga mipune kamo kare
kamusaburu tarupimye no saki kogimeguri miredomo akazu ikani ware semu
tarupimye no ura wo kogitutu kyepu no pi pa tanwosiku aswobye ipitugi ni semu
tarupimye no ura wo kogu pune kadima ni mo nara no wagipye wo wasurete omope ya
orokani so ware pa omopisi wopu no ura no ariswo nwo meguri miredo akazukyeri
medurasiki kimi ga kimasaba nakye to ipisi yamapototogisu nani ka kinakanu
takwonosaki ko no kuresige ni pototogisu kinakitoyomeba pada kwopwime ya mo
pototogisu ima nakazusite asu kwoyemu yama ni naku tomo sirusi arame ya mo
konokure ni narinuru monowo pototogisu nani ka kinakanu kimi ni apyeru toki
pototogisu ko ywo naki watare tomosibwi wo tukuywo ni naswope so no kage mo mimu

sentence.transcription: so no kage mo mi mu

block.header: kapyerumwi no miti yukamu pi pa itupata no saka ni swode pure ware wo si omopaba
poriye ni pa tama sikamasi wo opokimi wo mipune kogamu to kanete siriseba
tama sikazu kimi ga kuite ipu poriye ni pa tama sikimitete tugite kaywopamu
tama sikazu kimi ga kuite ipu poriye ni pa tama kwokisikite tugite kaywopamu
tatibana no towono tatibana yatuyo ni mo are pa wasurezi ko no tatibana wo
tatibana no sitaderu nipa ni tono tatete sakamidukiimasu wa ga opokimi kamo
tukwi matite ipye ni pa yukamu wa ga saseru akaratatibana kage ni miyetutu
poriye ywori miwobiki situtu mipune sasu siduwo no tomo pa kapa no se mause
natu no ywo pa miti tadutadusi pune ni nori kapa no se gotoni sawo sasi nobore
tokoyomono ko no tatibana no iya teri ni wa go opokimi pa ima mo miru goto
opokimi pa tokipa ni masamu tatibana no tono no tatibana pitateri nisite
asabiraki iriye kogu naru kadi no oto no tubaratubarani wagipye si omopoyu
unopana no saku tukwi tatinu pototogisu kinakitoyomeyo pupumitari tomo
putagaminoyama ni komoreru pototogisu ima mo nakanu ka kimi ni kikasemu
woriakasi mo koyopi pa nomamu pototogisu akemu asita pa naki wataramu
asu ywori pa tugite kikoyemu pototogisu pitoywo no kara ni kwopwiwataru kamo
pitomoto no nadesikwo uwesi so no kokoro tare ni misemu to omopisomekyemu

sentence.transcription: tare ni mi se mu to

block.header: sinazakaru kwosi no kimira to kaku si koso yanagwi kaduraki tanwosiku aswobame
nubatamano ywo wataru tukwi wo ikuywo pu to yomitutu imo pa ware matu ramu so
tukwi mireba onazi kuni nari yama kosoba kimi ga atari wo pyedatetarikyere
sakurabana ima so sakari to pito pa ipedo ware pa sabusi mo kimi to si araneba
apiomopazu aru ramu kimi wo ayasiku mo nagekiwataru ka pito no topu made
asipikwino yama pa naku moga tukwi mireba onaziki satwo wo kokoro pyedatetu
wa ga sekwo ga puruki kakitu no sakurabana imada pupumyeri pitome mi ni kone
kwopu to ipu pa e mo naduketari ipu subye no taduki mo naki pa a ga mwi narikyeri
misimanwo ni kasumi tanabiki sikasugani kinopu mo kyepu mo yuki pa puritutu
tunepito no kwopu to ipu ywori pa amari nite ware pa sinu beku narinitarazu ya
kataomopi wo uma ni putumani oposemote kwosibye ni yaraba pito katapamu
amazakaru pina no yatukwo ni amepito si kaku kwopwi suraba ikyeru sirusi ari
tune no kwopwi imada yamanu ni miyakwo ywori uma ni kwopwi koba ninapiapemu kamo
akatoki ni nanori naku naru pototogisu iya medurasiku omopoyuru kamo
yakitatiwo twonami no seki ni asu ywori pa moribye yariswope kimi wo todomemu
aburapwi no pikari ni miyuru wa ga kadura sayuri no pana no wemapasiki kamo
tomosibwi no pikari ni miyuru sayuribana yuri mo apamu to omopisometeki
sayuribana yuri mo apamu to omope koso ima no masaka mo urupasimi sure

takamikura ama no pitugi to sumyeroki no kamwi no mikoto no kikosiwosu kuni no mapora ni yama wo si mo sapani opomito momotori no kiwite naku kowe paru sareba kiki no kanasi mo idure wo ka wakite sinwopamu unopana no saku tukwi tateba medurasiku naku pototogisu ayamyegusa tama nuku madeni piru kurasi ywo watasi kikedo kiku gotoni kokorotugwokite utinageki apare no tori to ipanu toki nasi
yuku pye naku ariwataru tomo pototogisu naki si wataraba kaku ya sinwopamu
unopana no tomo ni si nakeba pototogisu iya medurasi mo nanori naku nape
pototogisu ito netakyeku pa tatibana no pana tiru toki ni kinakitoyomuru
awo no ura ni yosuru siranami iya masini tatisiki yoseku ayu wo itami kamo

asipara no midupo no kuni wo amakudari sirasimyesikyeru sumyeroki no kamwi no mikoto no miyo kasane ama no pitugi to sirasikuru kimi no miyomiyo sikimaseru yomo no kuni ni pa yamakapa wo piromi atumito tatematuru mitukwitakara pa kazwopeezu tukusi mo kanetu sikaredomo wa go opokimi no moropito wo izanapitamapi yoki koto wo pazimetamapite kugane ka mo tasikeku aramu to omoposite sita nayamasu ni tori ga naku aduma no kuni no mitinoku no woda n aru yama ni kugane ari to mausitamapyere mikokoro wo akirametamapi ametuti no kamwi apiudunapi sumyeroki no mitama tasukete topoki yo ni kakarisi koto wo wa ga miyo ni arapasite areba wosu kuni pa sakayemu mono to kamunagara omoposimyesite mononopuno yaswotomonowo wo maturope no muke no manima ni oipito mo wominawarapa mo si ga negapu kokorodarapi ni nadetamapi wosametamapeba koko wo si mo ayani taputwomi uresikyeku iyoyo omopite opotomo no topotu kamuoya no so no na woba opokumenusi to opimotite tukapesi tukasa umi yukaba miduku kabane yama yukaba kusa musu kabane opokimi no pye ni koso siname kapyerimi pa sezi to kotodate masurawo no kiywoki so no na wo inisipye ywo ima no wotutu ni nagasapyeru oya no kwodomo so opotomo to sapano udi pa pito no oya no taturu kotodate pito no kwo pa oya no na tatazu opokimi ni maturwopu mono to ipitugyeru koto no tukasa so adusayumi te ni torimotite turugitati kosi ni toripaki asa mamori yupu no mamori ni opokimi no mikadwo no mamori ware wo okite pito pa arazi to iyatate omopi si masaru opokimi no mikoto no saki no kikeba taputwomi

sentence.transcription: kimi no mi yo mi yo
ya swo tomo no wo wo
kiywo ki so no na wo

block.header: asipara no midupo no kuni wo amakudari sirasimyesikyeru sumyeroki no kamwi no mikoto no miyo kasane ama no pitugi to sirasikuru kimi no miyomiyo sikimaseru yomo no kuni ni pa yamakapa wo piromi atumito tatematuru mitukwitakara pa kazwopeezu tukusi mo kanetu sikaredomo wa go opokimi no moropito wo izanapitamapi yoki koto wo pazimetamapite kugane ka mo tasikeku aramu to omoposite sita nayamasu ni toriganaku aduma no kuni no mitinoku no woda n aru yama ni kugane ari to mausitamapyere mikokoro wo akirametamapi ametuti no kamwi apiudunapi sumyeroki no mitama tasukete topoki yo ni kakarisi koto wo wa ga miyo ni arapasite areba wosu kuni pa sakayemu mono to kamunagara omoposimyesite mononopuno yaswotomonowo wo maturope no muke no manima ni oipito mo wominawarapa mo si ga negapu kokorodarapi ni nadetamapi wosametamapeba koko wo si mo ayani taputwomi uresikyeku iyoyo omopite opotomo no topotu kamuoya no so no na woba opokumenusi to opimotite tukapesi tukasa umi yukaba miduku kabane yama yukaba kusa musu kabane opokimi no pye ni koso siname kapyerimi pa sezi to kotodate masurawo no kiywoki so no na wo inisipye ywo ima no wotutu ni nagasapyeru oya no kwodomo so opotomo to sapano udi pa pito no oya no taturu kotodate pito no kwo pa oya no na tatazu opokimi ni maturwopu mono to ipitugyeru koto no tukasa so adusayumi te ni torimotite turugitati kosi ni toripaki asa mamori yupu no mamori ni opokimi no mikadwo no mamori ware wo okite pito pa arazi to iyatate omopi si masaru opokimi no mikoto no saki wo taputwoku si areba

sentence.transcription: kimi no mi yo mi yo
ya swo tomo no wo wo
kiywo ki so no na wo

block.header: masurawo no kokoro omopoyu opokimi no mikoto no saki wo kikeba taputwomi
masurawo no kokoro omopoyu opokimi no mikoto no saki no taputwoku si areba
opotomo no topotu kamuoya no okutukwi pa siruku sime tate pito no siru beku
sumyeroki no miyo sakayemu to aduma n aru mitinokuyama ni kuganebana saku

takamikura ama no pitugi to ame no sita sirasimyesikyeru sumyeroki no kamwi no mikoto no kasikwoku mo pazimetamapite taputwoku mo sadametamapyeru miyosinwo no ko no opomiya ni arigaywopi myesitamapu rasi mononopuno yaswotomonowo mo ono ga opyeru ono ga na opite opokimi no make no manima ni ko no kapa no tayuru koto naku ko no yama no iya tugitugini kaku si koso tukapematurame iya toponagani
inisipye wo omoposu rasi mo wa go opokimi yosinwonomiya wo arigaywopimyesu
mononopuno yaswoudipito mo yosinwogapa pa tayuru koto naku tukapetutu mimu

susu no ama no oki tu mikamwi ni iwatarite kadukitoru to ipu apabitama ipoti moga mo pasikiyosi tuma no mikoto no koromode no wakaresi toki ywo nubatamano ywodoko katasari asanegami kaki mo kedurazu idete kosi tukwipi yomitutu nageku ramu kokoronagusa ni pototogisu kinaku satukwi no ayamyegusa panatatibana ni nukimazipe kadura ni seyo to tutumite yaramu
siratama wo tutumite yaraba ayamyegusa panatatibana ni ape mo nuku gane
oki tu sima iyukiwatarite kaduku t ipu apabitama moga tutumite yaramu
wagimokwo ga kokoronagusa ni yaramu tame oki tu sima n aru siratama moga mo
siratama no ipotutudwopi wo te ni musubi okosemu ama pa mugasiku mo aru ka
siratama no ipotutudwopi wo te ni musubi okosemu ama pa mugasiku mo aru ka wagipyemu pa mo

oponamuti sukunabikwona no kamwiyo ywori ipitugikyeraku titipapa wo mireba taputwoku myekwo mireba kanasiku megusi utusemino yo no kotowari to kakusama ni ipikyeraku monowo yo no pito no taturu kotodate tisa no pana sakyeru sakari ni pasikiyosi so no tuma no kwo to asayopi ni wemi mi wemazu mo utinageki katarikyemaku pa tokosipyeni kaku si mo arame ya ametuti no kamwi kotoyosete parupana no sakari mo aramu to matasikyemu toki no sakari so panarewite nakyekasu imo ga itusikamo tukapi no komu to matasu ramu kokoro sabusiku minami puki yukike masarite imidukapa nagaru minawa no yoru pye nami saburu so no kwo ni pimo no wo no itugariapite nipodori no putari narabiwi nagwonoumi no oki wo pukamete sadwopaseru kimi ga kokoro no subye mo subye nasa

sentence.transcription: so no tuma no kwo to
kaku si mo ara me ya

block.header: awoniyosi nara ni aru imo ga takatakani matu ramu kokoro sika ni pa arazi ka
satwobito no miru me padukasi saburukwo ni sadwopasu kimi ga miyadesiriburi
kurenawi pa uturopu mono so turupami no narenisi kinu ni napo sikame ya mo
saburukwo ga itukisi tono ni suzu kakenu payuma kudareri satwo mo todoroni

kakemaku mo ayani kasikwosi sumyeroki no kami no opomiyo ni tadimamori tokoyo ni watari yapoko moti mawide kosi toki tokizikuno kaku no ko no mwi wo kasikwoku mo nokositamapyere kuni mo seni opwitatisakaye paru sareba pikwoye moitutu pototogisu naku satukwi ni pa patupana wo yeda ni taworite wotomyera ni tutwo ni mo yari mi sirwotapeno swode ni mo kwokire kagupasimi okite karasi mi ayuru mwi pa tama ni nukitutu te ni makite miredomo akazu akidukeba sigure no ame puri asipikwino yama no konure pa kurenawi ni nipopi tiredomo tatibana no nareru so no mwi pa pitateri ni iya migaposiku miyuki puru puyu ni itareba simo okedomo so no pa mo karezu tokipa nasu iya sakabayeni sikare koso kamwi no miyo ywori yorosinape ko no tatibana wo tokizikuno kaku no ko no mwi to nadukekye rasi mo

sentence.transcription: kaku no ko no mwi wo
nar e ru so no mwi pa
so no pa mo kare zu
kaku no ko no mwi to

block.header: tatibana pa pana ni mo mwi ni mo mituredomo iya tokizikuni napo si migaposi

sentence.transcription: pana ni mo mwi ni mo

block.header: opokimi no topono mikado to makitamapu tukasa no manima miyuki puru kwosi ni kudariki aratama no tosi no itutose sikitapeno tamakura makazu pimo tokazu marone wo sureba ibusemito kokoronagusa ni nadesikwo wo yadwo ni makioposi natu no nwo no sayuri pikiuwete saku pana wo ide miru gotoni nadesikwo ga so no panaduma ni sayuribana yuri mo apamu to nagusamuru kokoro si nakupa amazakaru pina ni pitopi mo aru beku mo are ya

sentence.transcription: aru be ku mo are ya

block.header: nadesikwo ga pana miru gotoni wotomyera ga wemapi no nipopi omopoyuru kamo
sayuribana yuri mo apamu to sitabapuru kokoro si nakupa kyepu mo peme ya mo

sentence.transcription: kyepu mo pe me ya mo

block.header: opokimi no maki no manima ni torimotite tukapuru kuni no tosi no uti no koto katanemoti tamapoko no miti ni idetati ipane pumi yama kwoe nwo yuki miyakwopye ni mawisi wa ga se wo aratama no tosi yukigapyeri tukwi kasane minu pi samanemi kwopuru sora yasuku si araneba pototogisu kinaku satukwi no ayamyegusa yomogwi kaduraki sakamiduki aswobinaguredo imidukapa yukike papurite yuku midu no iya masini nomwi tadu ga naku nagwoye no suge no nemokoroni omopimusubore nagekitutu a ga matu kimi ga koto wopari kapyerimakarite natu no nwo no sayuri no pana no panawemi ni nipubuni wemite apasitaru kyepu wo pazimete kagami nasu kaku si tune mimu omogapari sezu

sentence.transcription: mawi si wa ga se wo
mi nu pi sa mane mi

block.header: kozo no aki apimisi manima kyepu mireba omo ya medurasi miyakwokatapito
kaku site mo apimiru monowo sukunaku mo tositukwi pureba kwopwisikyere ya mo
inisipye ywo sinwopinikyereba pototogisu naku kowe kikite kwopwisiki monowo
mimaku pori omopisi napeni kadura kake kagupasi kimi wo apimituru kamo
mawiri no kimi ga sugata wo mizu pisani pina ni si sumeba are kwopwinikyeri
pasikiyosi imo ga sugata wo mizu pisani pina ni si sumeba are kwopwinikyeri

sumyeroki no sikimasu kuni no ame no sita yomo no miti ni pa uma no tume itukusu kipami punanope no ipaturu madeni inisipye ywo ima no wotutu ni yorodutukwi maturu tukasa to tukuritaru so no naripapi wo ame purazu pi no kasanareba uwesi ta mo makisi patake mo asa gotoni sibomikareyuku so wo mireba kokoro wo itami midorikwo no ti kopu ga gotoku ama tu midu apugite zo matu asipikwino yama no tawori ni ko no miyuru ama no sirakumo watatumi no oki tu miyapye ni tatiwatari tonogumoriapite ame mo tamapane
ko no miyuru kumo pobikorite tonogumori ame mo puranu ka kokorodarapi ni
wa ga porisi ame pa purikinu kaku si araba kotoage sezu tomo tosi pa sakayemu

amaderasu kamwi no miyo ywori yasunokapa naka ni pyedatete mukapidati swode purikapasi iki no wo ni nagekasu kwora watarimori pune mo maukezu pasi dani mo watasite araba so no pe yu mo iyukiwatarasi tadusapari unagakeriwite omoposiki koto mo katarapi nagusamuru kokoro pa aramu wo nani si ka mo aki ni si araneba kotodopi no tomosiki kwora utusemino yo no pito ware mo koko wo si mo ayani kususimi yukikaparu tosi no pa gotoni ama no para purisakemitutu ipitugi ni sure
ama no gapa pasi wataseraba so no pe yu mo iwatarasamu wo aki ni arazu tomo
yasunokapa komukapidatite tosi no kwopwi kenagaki kwora ga tumadwopi no ywo so

sentence.transcription: ke naga ki kwo ra ga

block.header: kusamakura tabi no okina to omoposite pari so tamapyeru nupamu mono moga
paribukurwo toriage mapye ni oki kapyesapeba ono to mo ono ya ura mo tugitari
paribukurwo obitutukenagara satwo gotoni terasapi arukedo pito mo togamezu
tori ga naku aduma wo sasite pusape si ni yukamu to omopedo yosi mo sane nasi
tatasa ni mo ka ni mo yokosa mo yatukwo to so are pa arikyeru nusi no tonodwo ni

sentence.transcription: ka ni mo yoko sa mo

block.header: paribukurwo kore pa tabarinu suribukurwo ima pa etesika okinasabwi semu
yuki no upe ni tereru tukuywo ni ume no pana worite oku ramu pasiki kwo moga mo
wa ga sekwo ga koto toru napeni tunepito no ipu nageki si mo iya sikimasu mo
asipikwino yama no konure no poyo torite kazasituraku pa titose poku to so
mutukwi tatu paru no pazime ni kaku situtu api si wemiteba tokizikyeme ya mo
yabunami no satwo ni yadwo kari parusame ni komoritutumu to imo ni tugetu ya
